entitySettings.title: Entity Settings
entitySettings.impactName: The new name will appear in member lists, invitations, reports, and the audit log after saving.
entitySettings.impactDescription: Changing the description clarifies the purpose for members, but does not change wallets, paths, or subscriptions.
entitySettings.impactBankComplete: Completing bank details improves financial operation readiness and platform review, but does not transfer or change any balance.
entitySettings.impactBankIncomplete: Bank details will remain incomplete; a pending or readiness-gap status may appear before financial operations.
entitySettings.impactNoPermissionChange: Member permissions, dues, or balances will not change just by saving this basic data.
entitySettings.impactNoneYet: No unsaved changes yet. Edit a field to see its impact before saving.
entitySettings.closureSentMsg: Closure request sent — the platform will review it and notify you
entitySettings.closureWarning: Requesting closure will freeze the entity. The conditions below must be met before closing.
entitySettings.closureReasonPlaceholder: State the reason for closing the entity…
entitySettings.completeChecksHint: Complete the conditions above to enable the closure button
entitySettings.confirmClosureDesc: The entity will be frozen and the platform will notify all members. This action is hard to reverse.
